title: On A Friend Who Died Suddenly Upon The Seashore
content:
Quiet he lived, and quietly died;
    Nor, like the unwilling tide,
    Did once complain or strive
    To stay one brief hour more alive.

title: After London
When All Is Said
content:

content:
They say that I shall find him if I go
    Along the dusty highways, or the green
    Tracks of the downland shepherds, or between

title: The Temple
content:
Between the erect and solemn trees
    I will go down upon my knees;
        I shall not find this day
        So meet a place to pray.

    H
